title: Analysis: The law sets a 60-day limit on unauthorized wars. Will Trump respect it?
snippet: CNN analysis: Trump has until May 1 to obtain congressional approval under War Powers Resolution. He alerted Congress on March 2, so the 60-day mark hits May 1. Republicans argue ceasefire pauses the clock. Trump can extend 30 days but only for withdrawal. Historical precedent: presidents have bypassed the act using other authority sources.
tag_reason: 4/24 Lawfare WPR 분석(src-456)의 후속. CNN이 4/25에 '트럼프가 존중할 것인가'로 프레이밍 변경. 신규 분석 포함.
